review_target: Round of 32 M77-M80 v3 pre-match prediction chain after final modeler 22:11:42

global_blocking_gates.gate: latest injuries, suspensions, and minutes restrictions

red_team_read: Market calibration is disabled because same-source odds are missing.
Predicted lineups are data-collector probable lineups, not T-75 official lineups.
Probabilities are 90-minute 1X2 only; advancement, extra time and penalties are not simulated.
duplicate_counting_risks: France 4-1 Norway signal, Mbappe/Dembele/Olise player_state and transition tactical boost may stack.
Norway Haaland/Odegaard attacking value can be counted in player_state, attack score and set-piece/tactical routes.
Mexico host/altitude can be counted in schedule_environment, tactics and later market pricing if not capped.
England brand/team strength, set pieces, Kane/Bellingham state and favorite ceiling can overstate the 4+ tail.
DR Congo transition/set-piece upset branch should remain separate from generic attack rating.

top_concerns.concern: France favorite and 4+ ceiling are plausible but vulnerable to duplicate counting.
top_concerns.evidence: Model has France 61.94%, xG 2.10 and 16.14% France 4+; tactics warns France transition and elite-form signals can overlap with player_state and attack rating.
top_concerns.why_it_matters: A favorite can be correctly favored but still have overfat blowout tail if the 4-1 Norway signal is counted multiple times.
top_concerns.follow_up_check: Model owner should show caps across attack, player_state and transition factors before final prose.

top_concerns.concern: Sweden set-piece, aerial and two-forward branch remains a high-impact upset path.
top_concerns.evidence: Model itself notes Sweden set-piece/aerial branch is the easiest route to beat the model; tactics notes Isak/Gyokeres/Elanga transition and high-point value.
top_concerns.why_it_matters: The non-France-win mass is 38.06% in 90 minutes, too large for one-sided language.
top_concerns.follow_up_check: Confirm Sweden XI shape and set-piece personnel at T-75.

top_concerns.concern: No same-source odds means France public/favorite tax cannot be checked.
top_concerns.evidence: odds_implied_probability is missing_same_source_complete_snapshot and model_market_delta unavailable.
top_concerns.why_it_matters: Market may overprice France brand and recent 4-1 result, or may disagree for team-news reasons the model cannot see.
top_concerns.follow_up_check: Capture official Chinese sports lottery and same-source 1X2/handicap/totals.

upset_or_failure_scenarios: Sweden scores first through set piece or second ball and raises 1-1/1-2 branch.
France fullback height opens transition lanes for Isak/Gyokeres/Elanga.
France rotates or caps key attackers, cutting the 4+ ceiling.
overconfidence_flags: Do not publish France 61.94% as final certainty before T-75.
Do not convert 16.14% 4+ tail into handicap-like wording.
Do not confuse 90-minute win with advancement.
quant_chain_flags: xG and Poisson present after data/tactics absorption
matches.recommended_probability_adjustment: Keep France win in a provisional 59-61% review band before T-75 and odds; preserve Sweden non-win risk above one-third and avoid expanding the 4+ tail without lineup/market support.
missing_data: France attacker mix and Tchouameni minutes

top_concerns.concern: Norway edge is sensitive to Haaland and Odegaard availability/minutes.
top_concerns.evidence: Data says Haaland is probable_return after sitting out France; model uncertainty says Haaland and Odegaard are main xG switches.
top_concerns.why_it_matters: Norway 43.00% depends heavily on elite chance conversion and creation, not a broad team-strength cushion.
top_concerns.follow_up_check: Confirm Haaland/Odegaard/Nusa/Sorloth roles and minutes at T-75.

top_concerns.concern: This is the highest BTTS branch and one of the most event-volatile matches.
top_concerns.evidence: Model has over 2.5 at 57.9%, BTTS yes at 60.23%, draw floor triggered, and tactics notes both teams' transition/set-piece routes.
top_concerns.why_it_matters: Independent Poisson can understate first-goal, fatigue, red-card and chasing-state correlation.
top_concerns.follow_up_check: Add game-state sensitivity for early goal and late fatigue in Dallas noon conditions.

top_concerns.concern: Ivory Coast physical transition and set pieces must not be flattened into generic underdog status.
top_concerns.evidence: Tactics notes Haller/high points, wide runners and Germany/Curacao samples; double-counting warning says use phase caps.
top_concerns.why_it_matters: Ivory Coast win 32.92% plus draw 24.08% means Norway non-win is majority mass.
top_concerns.follow_up_check: Separate Ivory Coast set-piece and wide-transition tail in final prose.

upset_or_failure_scenarios: Ivory Coast wins aerial/set-piece battle and forces Norway chase-state exposure.
Norway attack plays but defense remains fragile after France 1-4.
Dallas heat suppresses pressing and turns the game into late-error volatility.
overconfidence_flags: Do not label Norway as a strong favorite at 43.00%.
Do not double count Haaland in attack, player_state and set pieces.
Do not ignore Ivory Coast/draw combined mass of 57.00%.
market_flags: totals market unavailable despite over/BTTS signals
quant_chain_flags: xG and Poisson present after data/tactics absorption
matches.recommended_probability_adjustment: Treat Norway 43.00% as a narrow provisional edge; cap public language around 40-43% until Haaland/Odegaard minutes and odds are confirmed, and keep Ivory Coast plus draw as the larger combined risk band.

top_concerns.concern: Mexico home/altitude context is material but double-counting risk remains.
top_concerns.evidence: Data says Mexico City altitude is materially relevant but exact conditions not refreshed; model uncertainty says altitude/home must not be double counted if odds later arrive.
top_concerns.why_it_matters: Mexico 41.73% is a modest edge, and home context can be overused across schedule, tactics and market.
top_concerns.follow_up_check: Refresh stadium/weather/altitude conditions and cap home adjustments when odds arrive.

top_concerns.concern: Ecuador transition after Germany win remains a live upset path but can be overfit from one match.
top_concerns.evidence: Tactics says Ecuador exploited Germany in transition but warns not to over-upgrade finishing from one upset; model has Ecuador win 32.49%.
top_concerns.why_it_matters: Ecuador tail is large enough that Mexico cannot be framed as secure, but the upset signal needs player-minute refresh.
top_concerns.follow_up_check: Update Caicedo/Plata/Paez/Valencia freshness and separate chance quality from finishing variance.

top_concerns.concern: Low-event draw is the central failure mode for one-sided language.
top_concerns.evidence: Top score is 1-1 at 12.24%, draw is 25.78%, over/under 2.5 is nearly 50/50, and draw floor is triggered.
top_concerns.why_it_matters: Any firm Mexico or Ecuador direction would hide a large draw floor.

upset_or_failure_scenarios: Ecuador beats Mexico's press through Caicedo/Paez/Plata transition.
Mexico controls venue tempo but creates only low-quality shots, ending 0-0 or 1-1.
Host energy raises Mexico line and leaves fullback space.
overconfidence_flags: Do not convert Mexico 41.73% into a strong home pick.
Do not double count altitude with tactics and later odds.
Do not lower Ecuador 32.49% without current player-minute evidence.
quant_chain_flags: xG and Poisson present after data/tactics absorption
matches.recommended_probability_adjustment: Keep Mexico win in a provisional 39-42% review band before T-75 and odds; preserve draw near 26% and Ecuador upset tail around 32% unless official lineups materially change midfield/transition assumptions.

top_concerns.concern: M80 canonical correction is satisfied but must remain guarded.
top_concerns.evidence: modeler source_status says confirmed_by_2026_06_28_canonical_bracket_not_20260627_temporary_pairing; data packet warns old England vs Senegal is obsolete.
top_concerns.why_it_matters: Any stale England vs Senegal text would invalidate the match packet.
top_concerns.follow_up_check: Main thread should scan final prose and filenames for Senegal references.

top_concerns.concern: England right-back injuries materially affect the DR Congo transition branch.
top_concerns.evidence: Data flags Quansah injury doubt, Reece James absence, Livramento absence; model uncertainty calls right-back injury a material defensive-side sensitivity.
top_concerns.why_it_matters: England 64.90% and 2.07-0.88 xG may overstate defensive control if the weak-side channel is exposed.
top_concerns.follow_up_check: Confirm England fullback solution and DR Congo Wissa/Mayele/Bakambu outlet choices at T-75.

top_concerns.concern: England favorite ceiling and public-team framing need market check.
top_concerns.evidence: Market delta is unavailable; model has England 4+ at 15.57%, over 2.5 at 56.55%, and favorite ceiling triggered.
top_concerns.why_it_matters: England brand and squad depth can inflate public confidence before odds and lineups confirm value.
top_concerns.follow_up_check: Capture same-source odds and compare handicap/totals against model before any publication language.

upset_or_failure_scenarios: DR Congo attacks England's right-back channel and creates transition/BTTS path.
England controls but struggles to break compact block early, keeping 1-1 or late draw alive.
England first goal opens DR Congo chase-state gaps but also increases late-card/transition variance.
overconfidence_flags: Do not publish England 64.90% as final certainty before T-75.
Do not turn 15.57% 4+ tail into handicap language.
Do not hide DR Congo 35.10% non-England-win mass in 90 minutes.
quant_chain_flags: xG and Poisson present after data/tactics absorption
draw floor not triggered despite compact-block/transition branch
matches.recommended_probability_adjustment: Before T-75 and odds, cap England win language around 61-64%; if right-back crisis persists or DR Congo transition XI is full strength, raise draw/DR Congo tail and reduce confidence in England 4+ margin.
missing_data: DR Congo Wissa/Mayele/Bakambu and Mbemba status

release_threshold: T-75 official lineups captured and compared with probable XI.
Final injury, suspension and minutes updates captured for all eight teams.
Official Chinese sports lottery and same-source 1X2/handicap/totals snapshots captured.
Model-market delta calculated after odds are available.
M80 remains England vs DR Congo in every downstream output.
No executable betting language while verdict is hold.
handoff_notes: Overall hold. Final modeler has absorbed data and tactics, so the prior upstream-order objection is closed. Remaining blockers are T-75 official lineups, final availability, same-source odds, market calibration and several overconfidence/tail risks.
